debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
𝓕 : Finset (Set α)
d : ℕ
inst✝ : Finite α
h𝓕 : IsNIPWith d ↑𝓕
⊢ card (@SetFamily.hypercubeEdgeFinset α 𝓕) ≤ d * 𝓕.card

failed_attempts:
classical
  cases nonempty_fintype α
  calc #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕) 
      = #((finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts.sup hypercubeEdgeFinset) := by 
        rw [sup_finiteSymmDiffFinpartition_hypercubeEdgeFinset]
      _ ≤ ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓒) := 
        card_sup_le _ _
      _ ≤ ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, d * #𝓒 := by
        apply Finset.sum_le_sum
        intro 𝓒 h𝓒
        sorry
      _ = d * ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, #𝓒 := by ring_nf; rw [Finset.mul_sum]
      _ = d * #𝓕 := by rw [(finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).sum_card_parts]

cases nonempty_fintype α
  induction 𝓕 using Finset.induction_on with
  | empty => simp [hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  | insert hA ih => sorry

classical
  rw [← sup_finiteSymmDiffFinpartition_hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  calc #((finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts.sup hypercubeEdgeFinset)
      ≤ ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓒) := card_sup_le
    _ ≤ ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, d * #𝓒 := by
        gcongr with 𝓒 h𝓒
        exact (h𝓕.subset ((finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).le h𝓒)).card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le_of_finite
    _ = d * #𝓕 := by rw [← mul_sum, (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).sum_card_parts]

cases nonempty_fintype α
  induction 𝓕 using Finset.strongInductionOn with
  | _ 𝓕 ih => sorry

classical
  cases nonempty_fintype α
  rw [← sup_finiteSymmDiffFinpartition_hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  refine le_trans (card_sup_le ..) ?_
  calc ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓒)
      ≤ ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, d * #𝓒 := by
        refine sum_le_sum fun 𝓒 h𝓒 ↦ ?_
        have h𝓒' := (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).le h𝓒
        haveI : Finite ↥((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ A ∈ 𝓒, A) :=
          (finite_iUnion_sdiff_iInter_of_mem_finiteSymmDiffFinpartition h𝓒).to_subtype
        have hNIP : IsNIPWith d (𝓒 : Set (Set α)) := h𝓕.mono (by simp [h𝓒'])
        sorry
    _ = d * #𝓕 := by rw [← mul_sum, (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).sum_card_parts]

classical
  calc #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕)
      = #((finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts.sup hypercubeEdgeFinset) := by
          rw [sup_finiteSymmDiffFinpartition_hypercubeEdgeFinset]
      _ ≤ ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓒) :=
          card_sup_le _ _
      _ ≤ ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, d * #𝓒 := Finset.sum_le_sum fun 𝓒 h𝓒 ↦ by
          have h𝓒sub := (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).le h𝓒
          have h𝓒nip : IsNIPWith d (𝓒 : Set (Set α)) := h𝓕.mono (by simp [h𝓒sub])
          have hfin := finite_iUnion_sdiff_iInter_of_mem_finiteSymmDiffFinpartition h𝓒
          haveI : Finite ↑((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ A ∈ 𝓒, A) := hfin.to_subtype
          sorry
      _ = d * #𝓕 := by rw [← Finset.mul_sum, (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).sum_card_parts]

classical
  cases nonempty_fintype α
  calc #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕)
      = ∑ A ∈ 𝓕, #{B ∈ 𝓕 | (A ∆ B).ncard = 1} := by
        rw [hypercubeEdgeFinset, card_filter]
        simp only [mem_product, ← Finset.sum_product']
        rfl
    _ ≤ ∑ _A ∈ 𝓕, d := Finset.sum_le_sum fun A hA ↦ by
        have : {B ∈ 𝓕 | (A ∆ B).ncard = 1} ⊆ 𝓕.filter fun B ↦ (A ∆ B).ncard = 1 := by
          simp [Finset.subset_iff]
        calc #{B ∈ 𝓕 | (A ∆ B).ncard = 1}
            ≤ #{a : α | A ∆ {a} ∈ 𝓕} := by
              refine card_le_card_of_injOn (fun B ↦ (A ∆ B).toFinite.toFinset.choose
                (fun x ↦ x) (by simp)) ?_ ?_
              · intro B hB
                simp only [mem_filter, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hB ⊢
                have hfin : (A ∆ B).Finite := Set.ncard_eq_one.mp hB.2 |>.choose_spec ▸
                  Set.finite_singleton _
                have := hfin.toFinset.choose_spec (fun x ↦ x) (by simp [Set.ncard_eq_one.mp hB.2])
                simp only [Set.Finite.mem_toFinset] at this
                have heq : A ∆ B = {hfin.toFinset.choose (fun x ↦ x) (by simp [Set.ncard_eq_one.mp hB.2])} := by
                  rw [Set.ncard_eq_one] at hB
                  obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hB.2
                  ext x
                  simp only [Set.Finite.mem_toFinset, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
                  constructor
                  · intro hx; rw [ha] at hx; exact hx
                  · intro hx; subst hx; exact this
                rw [symmDiff_symmDiff_cancel_left, heq]
                exact hB.1
              · intro B₁ hB₁ B₂ hB₂ heq
                simp only [mem_filter] at hB₁ hB₂
                have hfin₁ : (A ∆ B₁).Finite := Set.ncard_eq_one.mp hB₁.2 |>.choose_spec ▸ Set.finite_singleton _
                have hfin₂ : (A ∆ B₂).Finite := Set.ncard_eq_one.mp hB₂.2 |>.choose_spec ▸ Set.finite_singleton _
                have h1 : A ∆ B₁ = {hfin₁.toFinset.choose _ _} := by
                  obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := Set.ncard_eq_one.mp hB₁.2
                  ext x; simp only [Set.Finite.mem_toFinset, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
                  have := hfin₁.toFinset.choose_spec (fun x ↦ x) (by simp [ha])
                  simp only [Set.Finite.mem_toFinset] at this
                  constructor <;> intro hx
                  · rw [ha] at hx; rw [ha] at this; simp_all
                  · subst hx; exact this
                have h2 : A ∆ B₂ = {hfin₂.toFinset.choose _ _} := by
                  obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := Set.ncard_eq_one.mp hB₂.2
                  ext x; simp only [Set.Finite.mem_toFinset, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
                  have := hfin₂.toFinset.choose_spec (fun x ↦ x) (by simp [ha])
                  simp only [Set.Finite.mem_toFinset] at this
                  constructor <;> intro hx
                  · rw [ha] at hx; rw [ha] at this; simp_all
                  · subst hx; exact this
                rw [h1, h2, heq] at *
                exact symmDiff_right_inj.mp (h1.symm.trans h2)
            _ ≤ d := h𝓕.card_filter_symmDiff_singleton_mem_le hA
    _ = d * #𝓕 := by ring

  cases nonempty_fintype α

  calc #((finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts.sup hypercubeEdgeFinset)

      _ ≤ ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, d * #𝓒 := by

cases nonempty_fintype α
  classical
  rw [← sup_finiteSymmDiffFinpartition_hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  calc #((finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts.sup hypercubeEdgeFinset)
      ≤ ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓒) := card_sup_le
    _ ≤ ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, d * #𝓒 := by
        gcongr with 𝓒 h𝓒
        exact (h𝓕.subset (by exact (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).le h𝓒)).card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le_of_finite
    _ = d * #𝓕 := by rw [← Finset.mul_sum, (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).sum_card_parts]

classical
  calc #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕) 
      ≤ ∑ A ∈ 𝓕, #{B ∈ 𝓕 | (A ∆ B).ncard = 1} := by
        refine card_le_sum_card_fiberwise fun ⟨A, B⟩ hAB ↦ ?_
        simp only [prodMk_mem_hypercubeEdgeFinset] at hAB
        simp [hAB.1]
    _ ≤ ∑ _A ∈ 𝓕, d := by
        refine sum_le_sum fun A hA ↦ ?_
        have : {B ∈ 𝓕 | (A ∆ B).ncard = 1} ⊆ 𝓕 := filter_subset _ _
        exact h𝓕.card_filter_symmDiff_ncard_eq_one_le (mem_coe.mpr hA)
    _ = d * #𝓕 := by simp [mul_comm]

classical
  rw [← sup_finiteSymmDiffFinpartition_hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  calc #((finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts.sup hypercubeEdgeFinset)
      ≤ ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓒) := card_sup_le _ _
    _ ≤ ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, d * #𝓒 := by
        gcongr with 𝓒 h𝓒
        have h𝓒' := (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).le h𝓒
        exact (h𝓕.subset (by exact_mod_cast h𝓒')).card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le_of_finite
    _ = d * ∑ 𝓒 ∈ (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).parts, #𝓒 := by rw [mul_sum]
    _ = d * #𝓕 := by rw [(finiteSymmDiffFinpartition 𝓕).sum_card_parts]

classical
  cases nonempty_fintype α
  exact h𝓕.card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le
